name: Project ARVT-88 Hardware Bill of Materials

structural_fasteners.specification: Stainless Steel (Grade 304 or 316), Length: 1000mm, Thread Pitch: 1.0mm
structural_fasteners.purpose: Clamps the stacked 3D-printed tower modules together under high tension
Joins the 1000mm tie-rods together vertically to span the 3-meter tower height
Secures tie-rod ends against high-frequency cavitation micro-vibrations
Distributes clamping torque evenly across printed plastic mounting ears

electrodynamic_harvesting.specification: Grade N52 Rare-Earth, OD: 76.2mm, ID: 51.5mm, Thickness: 25.4mm, Axial Magnetization
electrodynamic_harvesting.purpose: Generates the continuous dense magnetic flux crossing the fluid track
Machined down to act as flush-mount, corrosion-resistant pickup electrodes

electrodynamic_harvesting.specification: Gauge: 14 AWG, High-Temperature Flexible Silicone Insulation
electrodynamic_harvesting.purpose: Connects double-helical graphite terminals to the power distribution box
Bonds copper wires securely to the raw graphite electrode cores

fluidic_return_and_seals.specification: Outer Diameter (OD): 60mm, Inner Diameter (ID): 50.8mm, Wall Thickness: 4.6mm
fluidic_return_and_seals.purpose: Serves as the high-strength window for the Figure-8 Collision Chamber
Forms the solar-absorbent vertical conduit for the upward thermosyphon lift
Encases copper return pipe to create an insulation envelope for solar lift

fluidic_return_and_seals.item: Weighted Brass Hydraulic Ram Waste Valve
fluidic_return_and_seals.specification: Size: 1" NPT Thread, Swing-check design with integrated 350g counterweight
fluidic_return_and_seals.purpose: Snaps shut violently when flow velocity peaks to trigger water hammer spikes
Creates a pressurized, fluid-tight seal at all inter-module grid junctions
Seals NPT threaded connections between valves and printed blocks
Lubricates EPDM O-rings to prevent pinching during final column assembly
